Name: UMovieSceneSequencePlayer
Description: Abstract class that provides consistent player behaviour for various animation players

Variables.Name: bReversePlayback
Variables.Description: Whether we're currently playing in reverse.

Variables.Name: bPendingFirstUpdate
Variables.Description: True where we're waiting for the first update of the sequence after calling StartPlayingNextTick.

Variables.Name: TimeCursorPosition
Variables.Description: The current time cursor position within the sequence (in seconds)

Variables.Name: StartTime
Variables.Description: Time time at which to start playing the sequence (defaults to the lower bound of the sequence's play range)

Variables.Name: EndTime
Variables.Description: Time time at which to end playing the sequence (defaults to the upper bound of the sequence's play range)

Variables.Name: CurrentNumLoops
Variables.Description: The number of times we have looped in the current playback

Variables.Name: PlaybackSettings
Variables.Description: Specific playback settings for the animation.

Variables.Name: RootTemplateInstance
Variables.Description: The root template instance we're evaluating

Functions.Name: Play
Functions.Description: Start playback forwards from the current time cursor position, using the current play rate.

Functions.Name: PlayReverse
Functions.Description: Reverse playback.

Functions.Name: ChangePlaybackDirection
Functions.Description: Changes the direction of playback (go in reverse if it was going forward, or vice versa)

Functions.Name: PlayLooping
Functions.Description: Start playback from the current time cursor position, looping the specified number of times.

Params.Name: NumLoops
Params.Description: - The number of loops to play. -1 indicates infinite looping.

Functions.Name: StartPlayingNextTick
Functions.Description: Start playback from the current time cursor position, using the current play rate. Does not update the animation until next tick.

Functions.Name: Pause
Functions.Description: Pause playback.

Functions.Name: Scrub
Functions.Description: Scrub playback.

Functions.Name: Stop
Functions.Description: Stop playback.

Functions.Name: GoToEndAndStop
Functions.Description: Go to end and stop.

Functions.Name: GetPlaybackPosition
Functions.Description: Get the current playback position

Functions.Name: SetPlaybackPosition
Functions.Description: Set the current playback position

Params.Name: NewPlaybackPosition
Params.Description: - The new playback position to set.

Functions.Name: JumpToPosition
Functions.Description: Jump to new playback position

Params.Name: NewPlaybackPosition
Params.Description: - The new playback position to set.

Functions.Name: IsPlaying
Functions.Description: Check whether the sequence is actively playing.

Functions.Name: IsPaused
Functions.Description: Check whether the sequence is paused.

Functions.Name: GetLength
Functions.Description: Get the playback length of the sequence

Functions.Name: GetPlayRate
Functions.Description: Get the playback rate of this player.

Functions.Name: SetPlayRate
Functions.Description: Set the playback rate of this player. Negative values will play the animation in reverse.

Params.Name: PlayRate
Params.Description: - The new rate of playback for the animation.

Functions.Name: SetPlaybackRange
Functions.Description: Sets the range in time to be played back by this player, overriding the default range stored in the asset

Params.Name: NewStartTime
Params.Description: The new starting time for playback

Params.Name: NewEndTime
Params.Description: The new ending time for playback. Must be larger than the start time.

Functions.Name: GetPlaybackStart
Functions.Description: Get the offset within the level sequence to start playing

Functions.Name: GetPlaybackStartSeconds
Functions.Description: Get the offset seconds within the level sequence to start playing

Functions.Name: GetPlaybackEnd
Functions.Description: Get the offset within the level sequence to finish playing

Functions.Name: GetPlaybackEndSeconds
Functions.Description: Get the offset seconds within the level sequence to finish playing

Functions.Name: GetBoundObjects
Functions.Description: Retrieve all objects currently bound to the specified binding identifier

Delegate.Name: OnPlay
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the level sequence player is played

Delegate.Name: OnPlayReverse
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the level sequence player is played in reverse

Delegate.Name: OnStop
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the level sequence player is stopped

Delegate.Name: OnPause
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the level sequence player is paused

Delegate.Name: OnFinished
Delegate.Description: Event triggered when the level sequence player finishes naturally (without explicitly calling stop)
